sentences.arabic: احْتَجْتُ إِلَى تَغْيِيرِ بَعْضِ الدَّرَاهِمِ قَبْلَ الذَّهَابِ إِلَى السُّوقِ.
sentences.translation: Trebalo mi je zamijeniti nešto novca prije odlaska na pijacu.
sentences.translationEn: I needed to exchange some money before going to the market.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلْتُ فِي الْفُنْدُقِ عَنْ أَقْرَبِ مَكْتَبِ صَرْفٍ.
sentences.translation: Upitao sam u hotelu gdje je najbliži mjenjač.
sentences.translationEn: I asked at the hotel where the nearest exchange office was.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى الْمَكْتَبِ وَسَأَلْتُ عَنْ سِعْرِ الصَّرْفِ الْيَوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Otišao sam u mjenjačnicu i pitao za današnji kurs.
sentences.translationEn: I went there and asked about today's exchange rate.

sentences.arabic: صَرَفَ الْمُوَظَّفُ لِي الأَمْوَالَ وَأَعْطَانِي وَصْلًا بِالْعَمَلِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Službenik mi je zamijenio novac i dao mi potvrdu o transakciji.
sentences.translationEn: The clerk exchanged the money and gave me a receipt.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْمُهِمِّ دَائِمًا أَنْ تَحْتَفِظَ بِبَعْضِ النُّقُودِ مَعَكَ فِي السَّفَرِ.
sentences.translation: Uvijek je važno imati nešto gotovine pri sebi dok putuješ.
sentences.translationEn: It is always important to keep some cash on you when travelling.
